title: Perform pruning operations
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform pruning operations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for pruning operations

pcs.text: Receive and confirm instructions with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Receive and confirm instructions with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Receive and confirm instructions with supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm access to site and location of trees and work zones
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm access to site and location of trees and work zones?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm access to site and location of trees and work zones.

pcs.text: Determine type, extent and limit of pruning work in accordance with specifications, scope of works and client brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine type, extent and limit of pruning work in accordance with specifications, scope of works and client brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine type, extent and limit of pruning work in accordance with specifications, scope of works and client brief.

pcs.text: Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement site-specific control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement site-specific control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement site-specific control measures.

pcs.text: Communicate with work team using agreed methods according to works undertaken and site and environmental conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with work team using agreed methods according to works undertaken and site and environmental conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with work team using agreed methods according to works undertaken and site and environmental conditions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for pruning operations

elements.title: Prepare tools, equipment and work environment

pcs.text: Select tools and equipment for pruning work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools and equipment for pruning work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools and equipment for pruning work.

pcs.text: Consider access and impact of selected pruning tools and equipment on tree
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider access and impact of selected pruning tools and equipment on tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider access and impact of selected pruning tools and equipment on tree.

pcs.text: Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on pruning tools and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on pruning tools and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on pruning tools and equipment.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Disinfect pruning equipment during tree work according to hygiene and biosecurity procedures and tree assessment outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Disinfect pruning equipment during tree work according to hygiene and biosecurity procedures and tree assessment outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Disinfect pruning equipment during tree work according to hygiene and biosecurity procedures and tree assessment outcomes.

pcs.text: Implement workplace health, safety, site, environmental and traffic control measures according to JSA
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement workplace health, safety, site, environmental and traffic control measures according to JSA?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement workplace health, safety, site, environmental and traffic control measures according to JSA.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare tools, equipment and work environment

elements.title: Determine tree parts to be removed and plan pruning operations

pcs.text: Investigate tree canopy shape, structure and defects to determine pruning plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate tree canopy shape, structure and defects to determine pruning plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate tree canopy shape, structure and defects to determine pruning plan.

pcs.text: Assess tree structure for stem co-dominance and branch attachment to determine options for pruning cut procedure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess tree structure for stem co-dominance and branch attachment to determine options for pruning cut procedure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess tree structure for stem co-dominance and branch attachment to determine options for pruning cut procedure.

pcs.text: Identify tree part requiring removal and select pruning procedure and location of cut from identified pruning cut options
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify tree part requiring removal and select pruning procedure and location of cut from identified pruning cut options?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify tree part requiring removal and select pruning procedure and location of cut from identified pruning cut options.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Determine tree parts to be removed and plan pruning operations

elements.title: Perform pruning operations

pcs.text: Prepare pruning equipment to ensure cuts are clean
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare pruning equipment to ensure cuts are clean?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare pruning equipment to ensure cuts are clean.

pcs.text: Use pruning tools to make pruning cuts according to industry standards and manufacturer operating instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use pruning tools to make pruning cuts according to industry standards and manufacturer operating instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use pruning tools to make pruning cuts according to industry standards and manufacturer operating instructions.

pcs.text: Make cuts from a secure body position with awareness of extant tree hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make cuts from a secure body position with awareness of extant tree hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make cuts from a secure body position with awareness of extant tree hazards.

pcs.text: Maintain awareness of power line proximity, safe approach distances and clearances
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain awareness of power line proximity, safe approach distances and clearances?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain awareness of power line proximity, safe approach distances and clearances.

pcs.text: Select pruning cuts for crown maintenance or crown modification according to scope of works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select pruning cuts for crown maintenance or crown modification according to scope of works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select pruning cuts for crown maintenance or crown modification according to scope of works.

pcs.text: Perform pre-cutting techniques to avoid splitting or tearing of the stem and bark
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform pre-cutting techniques to avoid splitting or tearing of the stem and bark?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform pre-cutting techniques to avoid splitting or tearing of the stem and bark.

pcs.text: Perform final cut according to the principles of compartmentalisation of decay in trees (CODIT) and current industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform final cut according to the principles of compartmentalisation of decay in trees (CODIT) and current industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform final cut according to the principles of compartmentalisation of decay in trees (CODIT) and current industry standards.

pcs.text: Ensure bark at edge of all pruning cuts remains firmly attached
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure bark at edge of all pruning cuts remains firmly attached?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure bark at edge of all pruning cuts remains firmly attached.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Perform pruning operations

elements.title: Improve pruning quality

pcs.text: Review previous pruning cuts to determine tree response to pruning activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review previous pruning cuts to determine tree response to pruning activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review previous pruning cuts to determine tree response to pruning activities.

pcs.text: Assess tree response to previous pruning methods and compare with current work practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess tree response to previous pruning methods and compare with current work practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess tree response to previous pruning methods and compare with current work practice.

pcs.text: Seek advice from consulting arborists on quality of current pruning work practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice from consulting arborists on quality of current pruning work practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice from consulting arborists on quality of current pruning work practice.

pcs.text: Identify substandard current pruning cuts and rectify according to advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify substandard current pruning cuts and rectify according to advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify substandard current pruning cuts and rectify according to advice.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Improve pruning quality

elements.title: Complete pruning operations

pcs.text: Drop or lower pruned material into designated drop zone
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Drop or lower pruned material into designated drop zone?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Drop or lower pruned material into designated drop zone.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment.

pcs.text: Collect and dispose of pruned material according to environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and dispose of pruned material according to environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and dispose of pruned material according to environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain pruning records according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain pruning records according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain pruning records according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Complete pruning operations
